title: Busy Garden Insects Coloring Adventure
description: A fun coloring page featuring friendly garden insects that helps children learn about common bugs while developing fine motor skills and creativity.
instructions: Color each insect using your favorite colors. Try to use colors that match real insects, or be creative and make them your own!

content.image: A sunny garden scene with four large, easy-to-color insects: a butterfly with detailed wings hovering over a flower, a smiling bee flying near a beehive, a ladybug sitting on a leaf, and a caterpillar crawling on a branch.

elements.name: Butterfly
elements.description: A butterfly with big wings spread open, showing patterns that can be colored

elements.name: Bee
elements.description: A friendly bee with stripes on its body and transparent wings

elements.name: Ladybug
elements.description: A round ladybug with spots on its back and tiny legs

elements.name: Caterpillar
elements.description: A long caterpillar with many segments making up its body

learningFacts: Butterflies start life as caterpillars before they transform
Bees collect nectar from flowers to make honey
Ladybugs help gardens by eating tiny pests called aphids
Caterpillars eat lots of leaves to grow big before becoming butterflies
